dashboard.title: Billing

beta.description: Our revamped billing system is currently in beta. You may encounter issues or incomplete features. We appreciate your patience as we continue to improve the experience.

paymentProcessing.description: Track and manage client payments, process refunds, and handle payment disputes

billingCycles.title: Billing Cycles
billingCycles.description: Manage client billing schedules, cadence defaults, and invoice frequency settings

servicePeriods.description: Review recurring service periods and understand how invoice windows group them

invoiceManagement.title: Invoice Management
invoiceManagement.description: Generate invoice windows for recurring service periods and create manual or prepayment documents when financial handling differs from recurring coverage

overduePayments.title: Overdue Payments
overduePayments.description: Monitor and follow up on overdue payments and payment reminders

serviceCatalog.title: Service Catalog
serviceCatalog.description: Manage your service offerings, pricing, and contracts

recommendedFix.title: Recommended Fix
recommendedFix.missingTrackingDescription: Create a credit tracking entry based on the original transaction details and set the remaining amount to match the original transaction amount.
recommendedFix.missingTrackingRemainingAmount: Remaining Amount: Calculate based on any applications
recommendedFix.inconsistentRemainingDescription: Update the credit tracking entry's remaining amount to match the calculated expected balance based on applications.

customCorrection.label: Correction Amount
customCorrection.hint: Enter a positive amount to increase the balance or a negative amount to decrease it.

notes.label: Resolution Notes
notes.placeholder: Explain the reason for this correction...
notes.hint: These notes will be recorded in the audit trail for this discrepancy.

fourEyes.requiredDescription: This correction exceeds the approval threshold and requires a secondary approver to review and verify the change before it can be submitted.
fourEyes.requestSentDescription: Ask the secondary approver for the verification code they received, then enter it below to continue.
fourEyes.verificationHint: Enter the verification code provided by the secondary approver.
fourEyes.verifiedDescription: Secondary approval has been verified and this correction can now be submitted.

confirmation.importantDescription: Please review the details below carefully. This action will update reconciliation records and cannot be easily undone.
confirmation.verifiedDescription: A secondary approver has verified this correction and the approval requirement has been satisfied.
confirmation.thankYouDescription: The discrepancy has been resolved and the billing records have been updated.

errors.loadData: Failed to load reconciliation report data
errors.secondaryApprovalRequired: Secondary approval is required for this correction
errors.secondaryApproverRequired: Please enter the name and email of the secondary approver
errors.reportNotFound: Reconciliation report not found. The report may have been deleted or you may not have permission to view it.

recommendedFix.title: Recommended Fix
recommendedFix.missingTrackingDescription: Create a credit tracking entry based on the original transaction details and set the remaining amount to match the original transaction amount.
recommendedFix.missingTrackingRemainingAmount: Remaining Amount: Calculate based on any applications
recommendedFix.inconsistentRemainingDescription: Update the credit tracking entry's remaining amount to match the calculated expected balance based on applications.

resolutionDialog.title: Resolve Credit Discrepancy
resolutionDialog.notesPlaceholder: Explain the reason for this correction...

descriptions.createTrackingEntry: This will create a new credit tracking entry for the transaction.
descriptions.updateRemainingAmount: This will update the remaining amount in the credit tracking entry.
descriptions.applyAdjustment: This will create a credit adjustment transaction to correct the balance.
descriptions.customAdjustment: This will create a custom credit adjustment transaction.
descriptions.noAction: This will mark the discrepancy as resolved without making any changes.
descriptions.missingTrackingRecommended: Create the missing credit tracking entry so the transaction is reflected in the tracking ledger.
descriptions.missingTrackingAlternative: Create a manual adjustment instead if the original transaction should not produce a tracking entry.
descriptions.missingTrackingNoAction: Leave the discrepancy unresolved only if the transaction was intentionally excluded from credit tracking.
descriptions.inconsistentRemainingRecommended: Update the tracked remaining amount so it matches the expected balance after applications.
descriptions.inconsistentRemainingAlternative: Create a balancing adjustment instead of editing the existing tracking entry.
descriptions.inconsistentRemainingNoAction: Leave the discrepancy unresolved only if the tracking entry is intentionally offset elsewhere.
descriptions.genericRecommended: Apply the recommended correction to bring the balances back into alignment.
descriptions.genericCustom: Enter a custom adjustment if a manual correction is required.

dialog.adjustmentHint: Enter a positive amount to increase the balance or a negative amount to decrease it.
dialog.notesPlaceholder: Explain the reason for this correction...

resolved.title: This discrepancy has been resolved
resolved.description: No further action is required unless you need to review the reconciliation history.

errors.notesRequired: Please provide notes explaining the reason for this correction

contractLineGuidance.multipleLines: This service appears in multiple contract lines. Please select which contract line to bill against.
contractLineGuidance.tooltipNoClient: Client information not available. Usage will route to the system-managed default contract.
contractLineGuidance.tooltipMultiple: This service appears in multiple contract lines. Please select which contract line to use. Bucket contract lines are typically used first until depleted.
contractLineGuidance.tooltipSingle: This usage will be billed under the "{{name}}" contract line.
contractLineGuidance.tooltipNone: No eligible contract lines found for this service.
contractLineGuidance.wrongContractLineWarning: Selecting the wrong contract line may result in incorrect billing
contractLineGuidance.noClientNotice: Client information not available. Usage will route to the system-managed default contract.
contractLineGuidance.noEligibleNotice: No eligible contract lines found for this service.
